common.cta: Gbãtɔ ƒe kpɔɖeŋu mana fe o

hero.badge: Gbãtɔ ƒe kpɔɖeŋu mana fe o
hero.title: Dze wo ƒe dɔwɔƒe ɖe edzi
hero.subtitle: De wo ƒe ga ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ ɖe nyateƒelawo si eye nàtsɔ ŋku ɖe wo ƒe dɔwɔƒe ƒe nyinyi dzi ŋu dzi.

problems.title: Dɔwɔƒetɔ alo ƒoƒlu wò nye a?
problems.item1: Dɔ si mele ŋku ƒe dɔ me sõ tɔɖa?
problems.item2: Vɔ̃ tso ga ƒe vodada ŋu a?
problems.item3: Asixɔxɔ le wo ƒe ga ƒe ɖoɖo kpɔkpɔ me a?
problems.item4: Mehea dɔwɔwɔ ƒe agbagba kpɔkpɔ o a?

services.title: Mía Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔwo
services.creationItem2: Mɔnu le se nyuie sia ŋu
services.socialItem1: Fetu ƒe agbalẽwo si sɔ kple se
services.taxItem2: Ga ƒe asixɔxɔ ƒe ɖeɖe dzi le se me

about.title: Ŋutata
about.subtitle: Wo ƒe ga ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ ƒe dɔwɔɖola le Lomé
about.description: AGCE — Assistance de Gestion Comptable des Entreprises — enye ga ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒe le Lomé, Togo. Míekpea dɔwɔƒe suewo kple dɔwɔƒetɔwo ɖe woƒe ga ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ, asixɔxɔ, kple fetu ƒe ɖoɖo me.

contact.title: Wo ƒe gbãtɔ ƒe kpɔɖeŋu mana fe o
contact.subtitle: Dɔwɔƒe geɖewo xɔa ga ƒe to le ga ƒe asixɔxɔ ta eye wonya o. Èle dedie a?

footer.copyright: © {year} AGCE — Assistance de Gestion Comptable des Entreprises. Mɔɖeɖe katã le asime.

metadata.title: AGCE — Ga Ƒe Nuŋɔŋlɔla le Lomé | Dɔwɔƒewo Ƒe Ga Ƒe Ɖoɖo le Togo
metadata.description: Ga ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒe le Lomé. Ga ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ, dɔwɔƒe yeyewo, asixɔxɔ kple fetu na dɔwɔƒe suewo le Togo. Gbãtɔ ƒe kpɔɖeŋu mana fe o.
